# CLAUDE.md

## Project
E-commerce platform. Next.js 15, TypeScript, PostgreSQL.

## Commands
- `npm run dev` - Dev server on port 3000
- `npm run build` - Production build
- `npm test` - Run tests

## Conventions
- Use TypeScript strict mode
- Named exports only
- Server Components by default

## Avoid
- No `any` type
- No barrel files
